title: Ralph-loop 2.0? The real autonomous coder is coming...
summary: AI Jason discusses the /goal feature in Crewlet and related tools for autonomous coding workflows. The video covers goal setup, prompting practices, and mission exploration for long-duration tasks, framing these as steps toward true autonomous coders.
